subcodes.first_line: The world is a manifest Book that, in every moment, hath borne and continueth to bear witness unto its own decline [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم کتابیست مبین در هر حین بر زوال خود گواهی داده و میدهد بلکه مینماید از
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
